g.title: azure_topology
g.text: Azure Private-by-Default Topology — ref-webapp-sql + Cosmos + APIM
4 envs (RG-per-env) + shared RG · private endpoints everywhere · self-hosted ADO agents

g.text: Centralized Private DNS Zones (linked to all 4 env VNets)

g.text: App Service OUTBOUND into the VNet
